mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, provider_code, provider_name, provider_type, client_id, app_key, app_secret_cipher, authorize_url, token_url, user_info_url, scopes, enabled, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from auth_social_provider
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_social_provider (id, tenant_id, provider_code, provider_name, provider_type, client_id, app_key, app_secret_cipher, authorize_url, token_url, user_info_url, scopes, enabled, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{providerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{providerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appSecretCipher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorizeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tokenUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userInfoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scopes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

id,
tenant_id,
provider_code,

provider_type,

mapper.update:
update auth_social_provider
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
provider_code = #{row.providerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provider_name = #{row.providerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provider_type = #{row.providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_id = #{row.clientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_key = #{row.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_secret_cipher = #{row.appSecretCipher,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
authorize_url = #{row.authorizeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
token_url = #{row.tokenUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_info_url = #{row.userInfoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scopes = #{row.scopes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
enabled = #{row.enabled,jdbcType=BIT},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update auth_social_provider set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, provider_code = #{row.providerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_name = #{row.providerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_type = #{row.providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, client_id = #{row.clientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_key = #{row.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_secret_cipher = #{row.appSecretCipher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authorize_url = #{row.authorizeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, token_url = #{row.tokenUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_info_url = #{row.userInfoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scopes = #{row.scopes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled = #{row.enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update auth_social_provider
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
provider_code = #{providerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provider_name = #{providerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provider_type = #{providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
client_id = #{clientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_secret_cipher = #{appSecretCipher,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
authorize_url = #{authorizeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
token_url = #{tokenUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_info_url = #{userInfoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scopes = #{scopes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update auth_social_provider set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, provider_code = #{providerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_name = #{providerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_type = #{providerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, client_id = #{clientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_secret_cipher = #{appSecretCipher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authorize_url = #{authorizeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, token_url = #{tokenUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_info_url = #{userInfoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scopes = #{scopes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
